Friend--**We must act fast.**

Senate Republicans are planning to vote for their scam tax bill tonight, and we need to stop their plot to steal from the poor and middle class to give tax breaks to the rich.

[**The GOP tax bill is nothing more than a scam. Will you stand with me and denounce the Republican tax bill before the vote tonight?**](http://nm.martinheinrich. We cannot let them get away with robbing the American people to pay off the special interests and the well-off.

We don't have much time to act. That's why it's critical you join with me RIGHT NOW and stand against the GOP tax plan.

[**Click here to sign your name and denounce the GOP tax plan before it 's too late >>**](http://nm.martinheinrich. "http://nm.martinheinrich.com/page/s/denounce-the-gop-tax-bill-today?firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=87103&city=Albuquerque&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=4+-+Click+here+to+sign+your+name+and+denounc&utm_campaign=MH_EM_PT_180DO_171219_2_2&source=MH_EM_PT_180DO_171219_2_2&refcode=MH_EM_PT_180DO_171219_2_2")

Martin

| | **FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE**
**Contact:** Pete Seat, 520-990-4067, pseat@indiana.gop
**Date:** December 20, 2017
**Donnelly Votes Against Historic Tax Cuts for Hoosiers
_Democrat Donnelly Sides with Party Bosses in Opposing Job-Creating Tax Reform_**
INDIANAPOLIS - Indiana Republican Party State Chairman Kyle Hupfer released this statement following Democrat Joe Donnelly’s vote in the U.S. Senate today against final passage of the historic federal tax reform package:

**“Hoosiers will benefit from historic tax cuts that were supported by every one of their federally-elected Republican representatives, but received a big no vote from Democrat Joe Donnelly.**

**“Democrat Joe Donnelly sided with his Washington party bosses – and against working Hoosiers – again on this historic, job-creating reform. Democrat Donnelly could have voted to cut taxes for Hoosiers and eliminate tax loopholes that just benefit the wealthy, but he voted no. Democrat Donnelly had the opportunity to level the playing field for Hoosier workers and companies to help them win in our global economy, but he voted no. Democrat Donnelly could have brought jobs back to America, but again he voted no.**

**"When a vote really matters to Hoosiers, Democrat Joe Donnelly continues to vote no. Next November, Hoosiers have an opportunity to vote for a new U.S. Senator who will vote yes on helping Hoosiers get ahead on big issues facing us all today. We will make sure that these no votes from Democrat Donnelly are remembered by Hoosiers as they cast their votes.” **
###

name: Tom Perez
subject: Make Republicans pay for their tax scam
body:
Republicans in Congress just passed their tax plan. Now it's time to replace them with Democrats who will fight for our values.
---
**The GOP just voted to give huge tax breaks to the rich at the expense of working people. Chip in $3 or more to kick Republicans out of office by electing Democrats.
**[DONATE](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/40523efc/4067b0a/4fcbc8e8d/7e5dcccf/2126162295/VEsH/ "https://my.democrats.org/GOP-Tax-Plan-AB?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=1+-+DONATE&utm_campaign=em_20171220_tp_nd&source=em_20171220_tp_nd&refcode=em_20171220_tp_nd")**
**
Derek --

Republicans in Congress just passed their historically unpopular tax plan -- disastrous, sweeping legislation that provides a massive giveaway to the wealthy at the expense of everyone else.

We can make Republicans pay for this vote next November -- but only if we come together.

**[Chip in $3 or more today to make sure Republicans pay a price at the polls for passing this deeply unpopular tax plan that hurts working families.](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/40523efc/4067b0a/4fcbc8e8d/7e5dcccc/2126162295/VEsE/ "https://my.democrats.org/GOP-Tax-Plan-AB?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=2+-+Chip+in+3+or+more+today+to+make+sure+Rep&utm_campaign=em_20171220_tp_nd&source=em_20171220_tp_nd&refcode=em_20171220_tp_nd")**

Donald Trump and the Republican Party are calling this a major win for their agenda -- but the only true winners are the ultra-wealthy and large corporations.

Here's what the GOP tax scam does:
* Undermines health care coverage by repealing the individual mandate in the Affordable Care Act. This will cause premiums to rise by 10% for the average person and 13 million people will go without coverage.
* Provides enormous tax breaks to the top 1% and corporations, significantly widening the gap between the rich and the poor.
* Increases the deficit by $1.5 trillion by allowing the wealthy to pay less in taxes and forcing future generations to pick up the tab.

This legislation makes it very clear who Republicans are fighting for. Now it's up to us to fight back.

**[Contribute $3 or more to replace Republicans with Democrats at the polls in 2018.](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/40523efc/4067b0a/4fcbc8e8d/7e5dcccd/2126162295/VEsF/ "https://my.democrats.org/GOP-Tax-Plan-AB?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=3+-+Contribute+3+or+more+to+replace+Republic&utm_campaign=em_20171220_tp_nd&source=em_20171220_tp_nd&refcode=em_20171220_tp_nd")**

Thank you for being a part of this,

Tom

Tom Perez
Chair
Democratic National Committee

P.S. -- I am constantly amazed by the resilience of Democrats across the country. **[This is a moment to keep fighting: Donate $3 or more right now.](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/40523efc/4067b0a/4fcbc8e8d/7e5dccca/2126162295/VEsC/ "https://my.democrats.org/GOP-Tax-Plan-AB?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=4+-+This+is+a+moment+to+keep+fighting+Donate&utm_campaign=em_20171220_tp_nd&source=em_20171220_tp_nd&refcode=em_20171220_tp_nd")**

Our email list is the best way we have of staying in regular contact with supporters like you across the country and letting you know about the work Democrats are doing. This organization is powered by you, and we'd love to hear your ideas. Thanks for supporting our party.

name: Nina Turner, Our Revolution
subject: Legalized corruption
body:
The GOP is about to pass their scam of a tax bill without a single
#
Friends,
The GOP is about to pass their scam of a tax bill without a single Democratic or Independent vote. They are passing it despite more than two-thirds of the public making their opposition known and protesters risking arrest in the halls of our Capitol, fighting for their lives and livelihoods.
[**We cannot quit once this bill has passed --our resistance now couldn't be more urgent. Please chip in $5 to our organizing efforts so that we can push back against this phony tax reform in every district across the country.**](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7adf4/bed43eb/3dda0b9f/75fe8b3d/766348290/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/thetaxscam?refcode=em171219")
**The corruption of our campaign finance system is why so many people are disgusted by the state of our politics.** Republicans couldn't have made it more clear that their so-called "tax reform" bill is a trick and favors their billionaire campaign contributors who threatened to shut off funding if Republicans failed.
Our resistance to the Republicans' assault on the middle class and working families begins and ends with organizing. We have more than 500 local groups under the Our Revolution banner who are talking to our neighbors and preparing our communities to take back our government from the corporate oligarchy that has taken over our branches of government. The revolution needs our support.
[**Please make a $5 contribution to Our Revolution today and help us organize the grassroots to defeat the corrupt ideology behind the GOP tax scam bill.**](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7adf4/bed43eb/3dda0b9f/75fe8b3d/766348290/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/thetaxscam?refcode=em171219")
The GOP ideology has been laid bare in their attacks on everyone who cannot personally enrich them and their campaign contributors. The future of our country depends on us taking action right now--thank you for remaining by our side.
In solidarity,
Nina Turner
President
Our Revolution

Republicans couldn't have made it more clear that their so-called "tax reform" bill is a trick and favors their billionaire campaign contributors who threatened to shut off funding if Republicans failed. Our resistance to the Republicans' assault on the middle class and working families begins and ends with organizing. We have more than 500 local groups under the Our Revolution banner who are talking to our neighbors and preparing our communities to take back our government from the corporate oligarchy that has taken over our branches of government. The revolution needs our support. "" The GOP ideology has been laid bare in their attacks on everyone who cannot personally enrich them and their campaign contributors. The future of our country depends on us taking action right now--thank you for remaining by our side. In solidarity, Nina Turner President Our Revolution "" PAID FOR BY OUR REVOLUTION 603 2ND ST, NE WASHINGTON, DC, 20002 Not authorized by any candidate or candidate committee. name: Chris Van Hollen
subject: a playbook for growing inequality
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Van Hollen for US Senate
body:
| __
The GOP Tax Scam that passed the Senate last night, and is on track to become law today, is a scandalous redistribution of resources from the middle class to big corporations, big banks and the wealthiest Americans.

This bill takes money out of the pockets of millions of middle-class families to provide massive tax breaks to corporations, millionaires and billionaires. In the process, it further balloons the already large federal debt, drives up the cost of premiums in the health insurance exchanges, and, as many Republicans have already admitted, paves the way for large cuts to federal programs like Medicare and Social Security that hardworking Americans rely on.

And if that wasn't enough -- a last-minute sweetheart provision for real estate tycoons will result in massive personal financial gain for Donald Trump himself.

[**This bill is a playbook for growing inequality in America, and our response to this attack on middle-class Americans must be to hold Republicans accountable for this disastrous vote and win a Democratic majority in 2018. Are you ready to be part of the fight ahead? >>**](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91b93/70cdc2ba/46d940c9/3902406/3473517456/VEsH/ "http://action.vanhollen.org/page/s/stand-against-the-republcian-tax-bill?utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=1+-+This+bill+is+a+playbook+for+growing+ineq&utm_campaign=CVH_EM_PET_FULL_171220&source=CVH_EM_PET_FULL_171220")

In the final bill, millions of middle-class families will see their taxes go up. And for those middle-class workers who do get a tax cut, it will average $675 next year compared with an average cut of $70,000 a year for millionaires. And the top .01 percent of Americans will get an average cut of $190,000 a year. Meanwhile, our children and grandchildren will be left holding the bag for the national debt. All of this amounts to a stocking stuffer for Trump and his elite friends, and a bah humbug for everyone else.

To add insult to injury, the small tax cuts for some families vanish when the bill is fully phased in while the big tax cuts for corporations are forever.

The GOP Tax Scam represents a historic attack on the middle class and a complete cynical betrayal of candidate Trump's economic populist message.

[**There is only one path forward -- we need to work harder than ever to take back Congress in 2018 and govern in the interest of all Americans, not just the wealthiest. Are you with me?**](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91b93/70cdc2ba/46d940c9/3902407/3473517456/VEsE/ "http://action.vanhollen.org/page/s/stand-against-the-republcian-tax-bill?utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=2+-+There+is+only+one+path+forward+mdash+we+&utm_campaign=CVH_EM_PET_FULL_171220&source=CVH_EM_PET_FULL_171220")

The big money interests will be working overtime against us, but we can win the future if we work together.

Chris Van Hollen
U.S. Senator

body:
**NH GOP Chair Jeanie Forrester Statement on Tax Reform Passage**
**For Immediate Release:** 12/20/2017
**Contact:** Patrick Hynes, (202) 321-5310
CONCORD - NH GOP Chair Jeanie Forrester released the following statement on the passage of the Tax Cuts and Jobs Act:
“For the first time in over 30 years, regular Americans will receive relief from the federal government’s bloated, punitive and oppressive tax code. Under Republican leadership, Congress has successfully passed tax reform that will expand our economy and increase paychecks for hard working Americans. Meanwhile, New Hampshire’s federal delegation behave like puppets on a string for Chuck Schumer and Nancy Pelosi. New Hampshire deserves real leadership in our federal delegation that puts the interests of New Hampshire citizens first.”

###

**Thankfully, the New Hampshire Union Leader continued their commitment to real news and analyzed the plan. **
**[Tax plan analyzed: 89% of NH would save](http://email.robly.com/wf/click?upn=gT2AZ1ZnBy-2FrecDREa9-2BbY1qiyT3HuRDH6pVWPAnYR7NzHcllxbxKANoswLBmEa3TnnynE-2BMSEPd2xPyNgIacJUxq-2B45C1kdjbatEe72d-2FZQawOiOXqucZtb2fXbeDRr_enNSH-2FxHAAqXgxiHRFihpX91d75ERAkpfg4XQfmYhCFb47pW8iDRAYLsM9sf9wIa92fG-2FsxU68zXzzMA2nO2VCunl2bm-2FhLXsWS8P3XITs28GUU7Mnlu37POPaWv9myv4YWBbFU9plZi0-2B42tZfBaUujH4mxA3e6jOiyDa5q6HKz45-2B17g6DUNL-2BnIMAR30MHa25rRATfQX9WikBIxC7opHqYpTlelsZINwa4tnnje4LWL0RuLP-2FPSTa7X6tyDU4nWN0iPWo63-2BHzjIBwpGEm5W0ljldDImZZ9Kj2uZgRigo5K3XnFoGJrsLkbh1uSWwKEOuLb0-2B9-2F4zRrL75kgdQyN5Fydf26bYZ-2F5ZWfQvv0zaBFAZOHD6PvojaJw8aWy5J2VhKaSVuFbLlXM3uX6WqI-2FTWjeFXqJQtxs4ZvfzSXjOcgF3pFXcGmqicw5sjgSC051T4w0xHKwawhLdKQr3aA-3D-3D)**

**Today, the U.S. House will pass this historic tax reform package and send the bill to President Trump's desk - but we need to make sure people know what this legislation is about. ** **Here are some key points from the Tax Reform package: ******
**\- Nearly 9 in 10 Granite State tax filers would receive a tax cut in 2019 under the GOP plan**
**\- The average tax cut for New H ampshire residents works out to $2,900**
**\- A greater percentage of Granite State filers (89 percent) would receive a tax cut than the national average (84 percent)**
**This bill is going to greatly impact the people of New Hampshire. clean_body: ALL FOUR DEMOCRAT MEMBERS OF NEW HAMPSHIRE'S FEDERAL DELEGATION VOTED AGAINST A TAX CUT FOR 89% OF NEW HAMPSHIRE. There has been a lot of misinformation in the media lately about what the Tax Cuts and Jobs Act does for the United States. Thankfully, the New Hampshire Union Leader continued their commitment to real news and analyzed the plan. Today, the U.S. House will pass this historic tax reform package and send the bill to President Trump's desk - but we need to make sure people know what this legislation is about. Here are some key points from the Tax Reform package: ** \- Nearly 9 in 10 Granite State tax filers would receive a tax cut in 2019 under the GOP plan \- The average tax cut for New H ampshire residents works out to $2,900 \- A greater percentage of Granite State filers (89 percent) would receive a tax cut than the national average (84 percent) This bill is going to greatly impact the people of New Hampshire. So far, our Federal delegation has had numerous opportunities to vote on this bill, and they have all failed New Hampshire by voting in lock-step with New Yorker Chuck Schumer and Californian Nancy Pelosi. | This email was sent to mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com Republican Party of New Hampshire 10 Water Street Concord New Hampshire * 03301 \--UNSUBSCRIBE_ALT--

name: Bernie Sanders
subject: Now Republicans want to shut down Congress and head home? Tell them NO
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Bernie Sanders
body:
Maybe, just maybe, before Congress adjourns for the holidays they should pay attention to the needs of the working families of our country and not just the billionaire class.
#
Sisters and Brothers -
The wealthy and powerful in this country have never had it so good.
While the very rich get richer and the middle class shrinks, the Republican majority has passed a deeply unpopular tax bill that would make income and wealth inequality much worse. This legislation, at the end of ten years, would provide 83 percent of the tax benefits to the top 1 percent and the largest corporations. Incredibly, 60 percent of the benefits would go to the top 1/10th of one percent. Meanwhile, by 2027, taxes on 92 million middle class households would increase. Further, 13 million people will lose their health insurance and premiums on the individual market will increase by 10 percent.
Having passed this horrific legislation, the Republican leadership now wants to shut down Congress and head home for the Christmas break.
Well, I respectfully disagree.
**Maybe, just maybe, before Congress adjourns for the holidays they should pay attention to the needs of the working families of our country and not just the billionaire class.**
Maybe, just maybe, before Congress goes home they might want to address the incredible anxiety that some 800,000 Dreamers are facing who are on the verge of losing their legal status, and face the possibility of deportation. Can you imagine being 20 years old, having spent virtually your entire life in the United States, and now worrying about being forced out of the only country you have ever known because of Trump's incredibly ugly decision to repeal DACA? Despicable.
**Congress must act NOW to protect the Dreamers.**
The Children's Health Insurance Program (CHIP) and Community Health Centers, whose funding expired on September 30, must be reauthorized and fully funded. Before Mitch McConnell and Paul Ryan shut down Congress for the holiday season tens of millions of Americans and their kids must be guaranteed that they will not be thrown off of the health insurance they currently have.
**Congress must act NOW to protect health care for children and working families.**
If Congress does not act now, 1.5 million workers and retirees in multi-employer pension plans could lose the pensions they were promised by up to 60 percent. People who have worked their entire lives for guaranteed pensions should not be forced to live in poverty because Congress broke the promise it made to them.
**Congress must act NOW to protect the earned pensions of 1.5 million American workers.**
While members of Congress return home for holiday celebrations, many people in Puerto Rico and the US Virgin Islands will not be able to turn on their Christmas lights because they continue to have no electricity as a result of the devastation caused by the recent hurricanes. Congress must pass significant disaster relief to help the people of Puerto Rico, the Virgin Islands, Texas and Florida.
**Congress must act NOW to provide financial disaster assistance to those communities hit hard by recent natural disasters.**
Sisters and brothers: Our message is simple. Congress cannot simply close shop, go home and leave millions of working people in desperate anxiety.
**[Please send a message to Speaker Ryan and Senate Leader McConnell. Sign my petition telling them don't shut down Congress for the holidays until you address the pressing needs of the American people. Don't give tax breaks to billionaires while ignoring the suffering of working families.](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/stay-in-session?source=em171220-full "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/stay-in-session?source=em171220-full")**
Thank you for making your voice heard. The struggle continues.
In solidarity,
Bernie Sanders

subject: The report you must see.
body:
| | Help end 2017 strong so that, together, we can equip more Christians to vote their faith in 2018!
---
[ ](http://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.myfaithvotes.org%2F2017-year-in-review%2F&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=171220_apl_s1&n=1)
| Dear Peter, It’s critical that you know what your support, through prayers and donations, accomplished in 2017. I hope as you read about My Faith Vote’s work this past year you will consider helping us with our urgent year-end deadline for our goal of $500,000. [Thanks to a special $50,000 matching grant, whatever you give right now will be doubled!](http://www3.myfaithvotes.org/171220apl01?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=171220_apl_s1&n=2) We must reach our year-end deadline for $500,000 if we hope to see even more Christians vote in 2018. **In 2017 you made it possible for My Faith Votes to make a** **huge** **difference** **for** **Christian values!** Because of your support we were able to mobilize more Christians to stand united at the polls and hold our elected officials accountable to uphold Christian principles! In 2017, you made it possible for us to:
* Deliver Bibles to **every member of Congress**
* Deploy **new technology** allowing you to send emails to your own elected officials
* Use that technology to send over **155,000 emails to your elected officials**
* Provide resources informing Christians of the **2,000+ local elections** needing their vote!
* Send **over 20 million emails** encouraging Christians to think, pray and vote to stand for Judeo-Christian values in the voting booth
* Accomplish a nearly **90% voter turnout** from Christians who used our personal voter assistant technology – an incredibly high turnout!

Thank you for making this possible and believing in the vision to see 90 million Christians in America stand united so that America will again stand strong for God. But our work is not done. The 2018 midterm elections will not only determine a new political landscape in the House and the Senate but also in courts across America as the new Senate will confirm judges, and most likely another Supreme Court Justice. **If you give now your gift will be doubled because of a $50,000 matching grant. Any part of the** **grant** **that isn’t** **fully** **met this year will be lost.** [Please give your best tax-deductible gift to help us reach our $500,000 year-end goal!](http://www3.myfaithvotes.org/171220apl01?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=171220_apl_s1&n=3) Your support right now will help empower more Christians to vote their faith in the crucial midterm elections next year. We must reach out $500,000 year-end goal, and we are praying for faithful patriots like you to rise up and stand with us in commitment and prayer for 2018. I hope I can count on you! [](http://www3.myfaithvotes.org/171220apl01?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=171220_apl_s1&n=4) [Read more about what My Faith Votes accomplished in 2017 because of your incredible support!](http://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.myfaithvotes.org%2F2017-year-in-review&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=171220_apl_s1&n=5) **United. We Stand.**

Mike Huckabee
Honorary National Chairman
[](http://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=http%3A%2F%2Fwww.myfaithvotes.org%2F&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=171220_apl_s1&n=6)

_My Faith Votes is a non-partisan movement focused on motivating Christians in America to participate in local and national elections and be active members of society. By partnering with local churches, pastors, and national faith leaders, My Faith Votes mobilizes and equips Christians to lead the conversation on the place of faith in culture and politics._

Team --
Last night around one o'clock in the morning, Senate Republicans passed their disastrous tax plan, a reverse Robin Hood bill that gives tax cuts to Wall Street millionaires and corporate billionaires while hard-working families take the hit.
This cruel bill will set middle class families back, and the best thing we can do is hold Mitch McConnell and the extreme Republicans who passed this bill accountable.**[Please put your name down to let them know that we won't stand for their attacks on the middle class and that we will remember their votes for this devastating bill.](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdf9f/2a380d31/19a9ecd/fe3be8/2783156148/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjAzMjY0In0=/ "http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/s/denounce-the-tax-bill?source=e20171220_posttaxvote1_act&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=03264")**
Thanks to this back room bill that was drafted behind closed doors, 13 million more Americans won't have health insurance, $25 BILLION could be cut from Medicare, over $1 TRILLION will be added to the national debt, and Republican mega-donors will get a tax break while hard-working families pay the difference.
Senator Hassan believes that we all deserve a chance to get ahead and stay ahead - that's why she remains eager to work on a bipartisan plan that helps small businesses and hard-working people thrive.
Unfortunately, Mitch McConnell's partisan tax plan does the exact opposite.
[**Please -- Put your name down to let every single Republican who voted to send this scam of a bill to Trump's desk know that saddling hard-working Americans with higher taxes and increased health care premiums is NOT what we want from our government.**](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdf9f/2a380d31/19a9ecd/fe3be8/2783156148/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjAzMjY0In0=/ "http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/s/denounce-the-tax-bill?source=e20171220_posttaxvote1_act&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=03264")
Thank you for speaking out,
Team Maggie

A lot of politicians go to Washington promising big things. They say they'll fight big regulations. They don't. They say they'll cut taxes. They do

Friend,

A lot of politicians go to Washington promising big things.

They say they'll fight big regulations. **They don't.**

They say they'll cut taxes. **They don't.**

They say they'll help our economy... **but you guessed it... they don't!**

But not President Trump, he went to Washington and has delivered the biggest tax cut in decades. **Finally, a promise kept.**

[SAY THANK YOU TO PRESIDENT TRUMP](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=ae1f6200f7b14f879f5a70212c2df67e&_e=_ZZZBnak3cQYVvLn3UAllbD2THTFWAnl8BeQAwtXH6YGyhPeAOd9KKZkglhxXhbvqZUfPI4JqJ87mljSOPRbCXwnois9lmnMZX2ylAUx5FOFR1u-6eoKMOtcWskBFOcIG8mL2I4TJoIPX0x73aiUwfLjt_bWwOscEsznk7VH-reQhaYUDBKN9MM3UI3NeRmgaBULj2xYDNrycI9cyYsbVidAH1p3Q-7MLwTrBKqouudOw_Ld3utYq32zzfRspVkr9mHLD8IeyExDyEvMmPTVALKkkw34TuxMXPthkAUa0a8dfIXs54lJpzwhP2eLfooF2931aYoJYxbZatOT1pjJstUuxRsSHiEjKtJGNDaEgtxYj3fBuRTGutZ2OLx-8Fsh9KTg6teMcZQjF7UJE6sbDHM9SNwtw7_UApkfVYBOwFi17VGB1i1G91_NUjB-fsNk)

This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](http://links.iterable.com/e/eh?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=ae1f6200f7b14f879f5a70212c2df67e&_e=c1WXgTsESTmxEUCnTu1zZA8Cm_OAygvj33Rqd-dI-7Ch8pMAacsC0ME7olWF5X5wZvnINN-Kc9Su_-031RL67ZyfEXFXKY47VjALJu3leuCoXeZC9OZizpL6EqQA-3-o3GFDgaLpJ52U68Pr0tKFx9NDhv-ki24r2yf-FQl4PJsbgIuTzCO_-E3sAGq1QlfsYK0OlyA-Q1I0qThxaculZ8j4nneHa4y-NZSXxECxNMECsKm3wq026ma3B9JF5HXO). Thank you for helping to make Wisconsin a better place for our children and grandchildren. Together, we can continue to make change in our great state. I got into politics because I dared to question the reading practices being used in my daughter’s kindergarten class. For that, they literally sent me to the principal’s office. Can you imagine that? That moment got me started on my mission to expand opportunities for education across Wisconsin, but we have a whole lot further to go. What are the [issues](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=ae1f6200f7b14f879f5a70212c2df67e&_e=_ZZZBnak3cQYVvLn3UAllQeYm5mGYX3_E_oZA07Cn6Wr6sI45euB7PCCvk1cAl2vM3tNzo1OROyE1gawn5-57Hdcv3UpBsKwIIPfc9U3-J2gOfl5LPCNh_Ycape332GODS7pJtmGydCGAUvFUO7TIMmU1d9wako6LMsGlj0DnZeosPScUD9_lsrDn8_Iz5ljY37oi_kB8DTuUtOx1L4L9gYPe58JdeVT8Lqjckm5ztYrwys1SoAcDsvJB4JQhzZbcLitrbzrpE0BbK6IR0ypvZ77cDu3qCqOAAvE-lKHHKPqLFFoUjr0UA8OiuhlkAO6Ax7Z-TnqgYwOMy9qnHDk6a8P4a2EpHCIgRQ5eRFgTAPp4BlmmlTngVqVDccQPYkN) that you care about? If the past few years have taught me anything, it’s that if you want to make change, you have to stand up and lead. So I’m asking you, to [stand up](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=ae1f6200f7b14f879f5a70212c2df67e&_e=_ZZZBnak3cQYVvLn3UAllQeYm5mGYX3_E_oZA07Cn6VFMLOPSe4SwbazMb32IbWdWjA4s57ch2L7bR3W6MFA_O-a3tJ35CH_7Y7dRa2adZERXaLEz_ZxER0Oq-mIThXijSSFUBpyEpZbpIvVkPK0v6aQ2iKelG2z2J3sVM_gVhEfOwpI6pUBDx64xH3CMAp7Np5h73F09_FcKbrO-xlSM-yeNptlZ_s-L9X2l7oxJVldpWa5ectv0SM6eo9l5z8lckbKWs7nVdV-Ew5W4q6OT89g3AjoqcdCqLGxbXwWWs-orjC_ehIhrKGyff6KigCtF-uIWOEPcTV6CN0T4jTOaaHu89nvCFIPjVJ1PjhqCqfLiQjW4S5KfyUYitY6E2-8) to help me take the Wisconsin way to Washington. Already signed up? Looking to take the next step? Well, the first step is to like my campaign on [Facebook](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=ae1f6200f7b14f879f5a70212c2df67e&_e=_ZZZBnak3cQYVvLn3UAllZ1ojABychhcFOKBtoNUO_H54clitEwcgEZQPbo__vZUCBVUIMsWuPqbzRN5jYMdxJPg_bOMDhZoiRONHddgHLT0Sdvxwhz6hfkt1Vjp3ZlmRXpSHKz7EMlceJaFEi3gffDNHhSKKLHFJCjqJQhIMLrAB4_bG43bCH2gYCdbZRuIAXJ21YEV-Lq3SPaA8JVL3eXB86HEVIuyW_VjMOsnECR0anneIeYL1aQEkkW39GVT_IVst24lUor85IkQ0FgDQg%3D%3D), follow us on [Twitter](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=ae1f6200f7b14f879f5a70212c2df67e&_e=_ZZZBnak3cQYVvLn3UAllexHmewMVPPn9jyj64685fDp_zfdPqg7FMWgfBZbUAoHWQd5v1L8VIIaJ69dZYgw4hwDrkQLak1LEULm83I6KNkFl9YKisDPXbwalrtMuXISMJw1NuzCUv1p04t6jpkbQnph4PmXwVoKBpMTUvPSAej9eSkWxMNf3Aus2oEvBuVgEwV_froRAuUNLN-k_4sN3I6gbJTbDd8kI08krajPQRARF-RZm2uBjV6mOb7fiOk2a20QjpEv7awzAmk0S9j88A%3D%3D), and check out my [Instagram](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=ae1f6200f7b14f879f5a70212c2df67e&_e=_ZZZBnak3cQYVvLn3UAllT3cr01FAhxncSdIpwBKX5iGwE-ktxomJNCnsfaSm9VWIWmvv6K6Me7iaUAvF_-WKTnlmXNuRbkbEI7b_tDtwSC3EIYrctJsU6RTT1OHXHwbXZm2L1l4u-scvMPjlMS4Oue4XRQewSlgGgvZG4CxKWbihyLrngWVRKnDYjgoZNyXcR_BD2FV_BGn7liLYPOc1IeUNCpAXumTvKkRijgUpzQakFAXCgORRX23lvKeaj7cFP-uwzWnzwKAWVPS1TPXSg%3D%3D) feed. My team and I share lots of great news from the trail there... but considering that you’re still reading, you’re clearly a fighter. A true Wisconsinite.
